description: You are a Facilities Coordinator for a convention center. You have received multiple independent maintenance requests for the upcoming 'Summer Gala' event. To track these effectively, consolidate all active maintenance requests for the 'Summer Gala' in OpenMaint (admin/admin at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/). Create a new master work order with the description 'Master Ticket: Summer Gala Coordination' and 'High' priority. For every active work order with 'Gala' in the description (excluding closed/completed tickets or unrelated terms like 'Galactic'), update their descriptions by appending ' | Parent: {CODE}', where {CODE} is the code of the newly created master ticket.
